global.seriesWorld: A worn Berlin apartment building used as a repeatable social-comedy stage.
global.visualStyle: limited 2D, thick black outlines, simplified repeatable geometry, dirty warm neutrals with restrained neon accents, no photorealism
global.continuityCoordinateSystem: Every top-down layout uses north at the top and records entrances, windows, furniture and camera anchors with normalized x/y coordinates from 0.0 to 1.0.
global.generatedTextRule: No readable AI-generated notices, street names, labels or logos. Required lettering is added later as deterministic overlay art.
global.subtitleRule: Reserve the lower 14 percent and avoid placing essential props or faces there.
global.masterRule: A layout remains CANDIDATE_LAYOUT until a human review binds a source image and SHA-256.

locations.name: Haus Nr. 13 / Hausfassade
locations.storyFunction: First visual statement of the house, Ricco's arrival and Don Miau's elevated silent authority.

entrance.shape: tall double door with patched lower panels and a slightly crooked transom

facadeSignals: mixed window curtains and improvised plant boxes
one old cable crossing the facade
layers of removed stickers and notices without readable text
candidateDesign.number13Treatment: Do not rely on generated lettering. Leave a blank metal plaque position beside the entrance and add the number 13 in assembly.

donMiauPerch.continuityRule: Use the same primary perch for panel 001 and later exterior callbacks unless a shot explicitly documents the fallback.

dayPalette: small cyan or magenta accent from interior windows
nightPalette: muted red bicycle or sign accent

cameraAnchors.description: low street-level vertical wide, entrance centered, Ricco small in lower third, Don Miau barely visible on primary perch
three-quarter view from left sidewalk preserving entrance and primary perch relationship

continuityChecks: entrance remains at the same facade axis
window count and spacing do not change
Don Miau perch remains reproducible
number 13 is an assembly overlay, not uncontrolled generated text
facade reads as poor and repaired, not abandoned horror
essential composition stays above subtitle safe area

locations.name: Riccos Zimmer
locations.storyFunction: Visual proof that Basti's political language hides a tiny damaged room; emotional base for Ricco's phone call and final Don Miau verdict.

candidateDesign.roomShape: narrow rectangle, approximately 2.5 by 3.6 visual units
lockedDamage: one long plaster crack on west wall above mattress
one darker repaired patch near south-east corner
one missing or mismatched skirting-board section
lockedProps: thin mattress or improvised low bed
one small unstable desk or shelf for DJ dream
one exposed cable route toward router area
clear floor slot for oversized backpack
blue Tupperware lid remains a character prop, not permanent room decoration
nightPalette: small warm bedside or hallway spill

cameraAnchors.description: camera just outside south doorway looking north-west; mattress, window and west-wall crack visible; Ricco and backpack barely fit
medium from south-east toward mattress; damaged room remains visible behind Ricco; backpack and blue lid readable
night medium-wide from south-west; Ricco on mattress left, Don Miau elevated at north-east router or shelf, silhouettes clearly separated

continuityChecks: door remains on south wall and window on north wall
mattress remains along west wall
desk and Don Miau perch remain north-east
cracks and repair patches remain in the same places
room feels tiny but not like horror or homelessness pornography
panel 004, 005 and 008 share the same floor plan
subtitle safe area remains clear

locations.name: Flur / Treppenhaus
locations.storyFunction: Basti's power corridor and the connective stage between entrance, room and kitchen.

candidateDesign.layout: narrow entrance corridor opening to a small stair landing
lockedElements: worn wooden steps with darker center wear
colored rule notes represented as abstract blocks without readable text
exposed old bell or cable details
one narrow handrail with chipped paint
palette: muted red and blue abstract paper accents

cameraAnchors.description: vertical medium-wide from south corridor; Basti slightly higher near landing, Ricco lower with backpack; keys and cup visible
controlled half-close from Ricco side, keys in foreground, same stair direction behind Basti
camera near landing facing north-west notice wall; Basti presents abstract colored notes, Ricco stands behind and lower

continuityChecks: stairs always rise north-east
room door and kitchen door remain on their assigned sides
notice wall stays north-west
no readable generated rule text
Basti and Ricco can fit in the corridor without changing its width
lighting remains warm and dirty across panels 002, 003 and 006

locations.name: Gemeinschaftsküche
locations.storyFunction: Jule's everyday power center, where communal language becomes private control.

candidateDesign.roomShape: rough rectangle wider than Ricco's room but crowded by mismatched furniture
lockedElements: overfilled fridge with colored zones and abstract unreadable note shapes
mixed mugs and containers without real logos
one plant struggling near the window
palette: cyan, magenta and yellow note blocks

cameraAnchors.description: vertical medium-wide from west doorway; Jule occupies center-right before fridge, Ricco remains smaller at left edge, marker or tape visible
from fridge side toward door and table, preserving door, table and sink relationships

continuityChecks: fridge remains on east wall
door remains west and sink counter north
Jule's dominance mark and Ricco's reaction mark preserve size contrast
all note-like shapes remain unreadable
no real brand logos
negative subtitle space remains clear at bottom

reviewSequence: straight or wide layout candidate review
day and night palette test where required
human source binding and SHA-256 decision
decisionRule: These layouts are detailed candidate specifications, not approved location masters. Image generation and master binding remain blocked by the active LR5 sequence.
